title: Cork Protocol - Rekt
relevance_summary: Fake token deployment followed by manipulation of exchange rate calculations on a lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys a new contract and immediately interacts with the protocol's exchange rate calculation functions.

red_flags: Deployment of new contract followed by immediate interaction with exchange rate calculation functions
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that deploys a new contract and immediately interacts with the protocol's exchange rate calculation functions.
summary: The attacker deployed fake token contracts and manipulated Cork Protocol’s exchange rate calculations, draining $12 million in wstETH. A guard could have detected and blocked the attack by monitoring for deployments followed by immediate interactions with exchange rate calculation functions.
